note: Created SafeHandleTests.cs base class with shared stub pointer fields, ResetStubState(), convenience property readers (DeviceFreeCallCount, LastDeviceFreeHandle, SocketCloseCallCount, etc.), and SetSocketCloseReturn(). Refactored ReleaseHandleTests, DisposeOrderTests, ConcurrentDisposeTests, FinalizerTests, and CriticalFinalizerObjectTests to inherit from SafeHandleTests, eliminating ~100 lines of duplicated boilerplate. All 27 tests pass.
